microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation from a 2-person ops function into a **platformized product**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers like Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Owned **14 cross-org recovery executions** end-to-end under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract** and running high-stakes demos with customers, field engineering, and TAMs.

Prototyped and shipped an **internal AI agent** for drill planning using LLM-powered workflow automation, restructuring planning loops to cut cycle time **39%** and lift drill capacity **21%**—freeing the team to focus on the highest-leverage infrastructure work.

Triaged the **1,000 paper cuts** across the resilience portfolio—sequencing fixes with engineering, instrumenting feedback loops with data science, and writing changelogs that told the story of what shipped clearly to internal developer customers.

Shaped the roadmap for **intent-based YAML generation** by facilitating 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, scoping what to build and what to cut to close the highest-impact feature gaps developers hit daily.

Migrated internal documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting developer lookup time **83%** and building the feedback loop that proved the new retrieval model was working.

Defined a product strategy to eliminate region-launch toil, running discovery with **20+ service teams** to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region and scoping a roadmap to automate the critical path.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and unblocking shipping velocity across IT and Operations.

Cut Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and lifted conversions **2.7%** by executing a digital-first GTM strategy, instrumenting funnel metrics, and iterating on the website and Google profile based on user feedback.
